---
title: "Tidy data with tidyr"
code-line-numbers: false
---

```{=html}
<iframe class="slide-deck" width="780" height="500" src="slides/tidyr.html"></iframe>
```

[Slides in full screen](slides/tidyr.html){target="_blank"} &nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp; <a href="slides_pdf/tidyr.pdf" download>Download PDF slides</a>

# Task

Go to the [task page](tasks/tidyr.qmd) for the exercises.

## Further reading

- [Data import cheatsheet](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/rstudio/cheatsheets/master/data-import.pdf)
